flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of San Francisco rose 22% between 2007 and 2010 ($14.4k → $17.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of San Francisco rose 17% between 2007 and 2010 ($31.2k → $36.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of San Francisco rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.5k → $60.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of San Francisco fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
